details.browser_result: Generated Files loaded exactly one delivered PPTX and excluded the uploaded XLSX, but direct download navigation returned No auth token.
details.failure: The list request used the JWT, while the rendered download anchor navigated without an Authorization header.

details.description: Production generated-files tab release 9062311 with the authenticated panel load failing because its standalone fetch omitted the JWT header.

checks: browser fixture rejects missing JWT Authorization and renders generated rows with the bearer token
duplicate Generated Files heading and subtitle are absent
bash -n passed for deploy.sh and remote-apply.sh
existing generated-files pipeline performance evidence remains unchanged because the API implementation is unchanged

change_summary.expected_result: The Generated Files tab authenticates with LibreChat's current JWT and lists the current user's delivered artifacts while the native Uploads tab remains unchanged.
functions: Read the existing LibreChat access token from local storage
Fall back to the existing /api/auth/refresh endpoint when no access token is stored
Send the JWT Authorization header on generated-files list requests
Make the browser fixture return 401 when the Authorization contract regresses
Remove the duplicate Generated Files heading and subtitle so the dialog follows the native Archived Conversations hierarchy
limitations: This release does not alter generated-file discovery, ownership filtering, retention, or deletion
The existing generated-files API and native file download route remain unchanged
change_summary.reason: Production acceptance showed both file-category tabs, but Generated Files entered its error state because the standalone Client fetch relied on same-origin cookies instead of LibreChat's bearer-token authentication contract.
change_summary.risk: Narrow Client authentication change in the already versioned generated-files asset. Deployment still recreates only LibreChat-API because the Client bundle is mounted through that service; exact baselines, immutable assets, and automatic rollback remain enforced.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched /opt/librechat/backups/generated-files-tab-*/compose.override.yaml created by this deployment, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify /, /api/config, /api/user/usage-dashboard, /office/, and both My Files tabs.

unresolved_issues.issue: Generated-file download used direct anchor navigation and therefore omitted LibreChat's JWT.
unresolved_issues.next_step: Fetch the file with the existing JWT, create a Blob URL, and repeat authenticated download acceptance.

validation_plan.expected: The API contract passes and the Client/fixture enforce the JWT Authorization header.

validation_plan.command: Local browser fixture acceptance at scripts/fixture.html
validation_plan.expected: The generated table loads when the bearer token is present and would fail with 401 if the header is omitted.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated vip998 My Files acceptance without a model request
validation_plan.expected: The generated PPTX appears once, the uploaded XLSX is excluded, search and download work, and switching back restores the native upload table.
